description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build_image, test_image, and pages. In the build_image stage add a build_image job that uses the gitlab/dind Docker image, runs only on the feature/docker branch, executes `docker info`, logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with `$CI_REGISTRY_USER` and `$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD`, builds the image from the `dockerfiles/` directory with tag `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE`, and pushes it. In the test_image stage add a test-image job that uses the built `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE` image, runs only on the feature/docker branch, and runs `echo Hello World`. In the pages stage add an external_pages job that runs only on the external pipeline, builds documentation with `cd docs/`, `make html`, moves the generated HTML to a `public/` directory and stores it as an artifact, and a pages job that runs on all other branches (except external), uses the `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE` image, performs the same documentation build steps, and publishes the `public/` artifact.
